ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism (e.g., Solanum lycopersicum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organism */,
  "taxonomic_classification" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification of the organism */,
  "genetic_code" TEXT /* Genetic code of the organism */,
  "reference_genome" TEXT /* Reference genome of the organism */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the organism was added to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organism the library belongs to */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library (e.g., cLEC, cLEG) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library (e.g., combined undifferentiated and shooting callus) */,
  "library_size" INTEGER /* Number of ESTs in the library */,
  "library_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library type */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the library was created */,
  "curator" TEXT /* Name of the curator responsible for the library */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_libraries_library_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_type_id") REFERENCES library_types ("library_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_libraries_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_types" (
  "library_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library type */,
  "library_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the library type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library type */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the library type was added to the database */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the library type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_library_types" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "library_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library type */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was added to the database */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id", "library_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the gene */,
  "chromosome_location" TEXT /* Location of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "function" TEXT /* Known function of the gene */,
  "date_discovered" TEXT /* Date when the gene was discovered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expressions" (
  "gene_expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene in the library */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the expression level was measured */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the expression level */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the expression level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expressions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expressions_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unigenes" (
  "unigene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unigene */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "ests_in_unigene" INTEGER /* Number of ESTs in the unigene */,
  "date_identified" TEXT /* Date when the unigene was identified */,
  "curator" TEXT /* Name of the curator responsible for the unigene */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the unigene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unigene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unigenes_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unigenes_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
